SEARCH

Uses of Package
exchange

Packages that use exchange
Package
Description
exchange
It includes everything exchange-unique.
notification
This package contains everything related to the notifications of the store.
search
This packages contains all the tools needed to make a search.
store
It contains everything related to the management of the store.
user
It contains everything related to the different users of the store.
  • Classes in exchange used by exchange
    Class
    Description
    Exchange
    It implements the exchange
    Offer
    It implements the offers
    OfferStatus
    It defines the offer's possible statuses

    Description
    Exchange
    It implements the exchange
    ExchangeHistory
    It implements the exchange history

    It implements the wallet
